'''Bogg 2''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Bogden/Legends|Bogden]]. It was covered in rocks and dirt. Once per orbit, it passed close enough to [[Bogg 9]] to share [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. Counterfeiters sent fake [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from Bogg 2 to Bogg 9 via balloons, then claimed the counterfeit credits were stolen, receiving real credits in recompense.

{{Moon-stub}}

*''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]'' {{1st}}
